name: Solo Leveling /// RPG
description:
SOLO LEVELING

[ SYSTEM: ONLINE ]

The logic of Earth fractured exactly ten years ago. Shimmering portals known as "Gates" tore open the atmosphere, connecting modern civilization to dimensions teeming with magical beasts. From these rifts poured Goblins, Orcs, and Dragons impervious to conventional weaponry. To combat this threat, humanity "Awakened."

Society has reorganized around the Hunter economy. In the bustling streets of Seoul and the skyscrapers of New York, Guilds operate like multinational corporations, raiding dungeons for Essence Stones. It is a world of rigid hierarchy: Rank is absolute. An E-Rank Hunter is barely stronger than a civilian, destined to carry luggage or die in the fodder pile. An S-Rank Hunter like the "National Level" powerhouse Thomas Andre is a strategic asset capable of rivaling a country's military. But beneath the raids lies a secret war between the Rulers (Angelic Protectors) and the Monarchs (Ancient Destroyers like Antares), using Earth as a battlefield.

[ ! ] WARNING: DOUBLE DUNGEON DETECTED

>> SYSTEM ARCHIVE

The System (The Player): A game-like interface visible only to one specific user. It grants a "Status Window" with stats (Strength, Vitality, Intelligence), an Inventory, a Shop, and the ability to "Level Up" by killing monsters. It eventually leads to the class of Shadow Monarch, allowing the user to extract souls (Arise) to form an undying army. (Optionally - Just Basic Description)

Standard Awakening: For those without the System, power is static but immense. Mages cast spells without incantations; Tankers harden their skin like steel; Healers regenerate lost limbs. Whether you wield the System or rely on raw, awakened talent is your choice to make.

SELECT PLAYER PROFILE

The Custom Path (Primary): Craft a custom hunter such as a new E-rank awakener with your own class, a guild master scheming in Seoul, or a monster with unique Magic seeking dominance. (You define if you possess the System or simply high-ranking Mana).

(Optional) Replace Sung Jin-Woo: Jin-Woo does not exist unless you specify.

(Optional) Replace Cha Hae-In: Cha Hae-In does not exist unless you specify.

ARISE.

In the modern fantasy world of "Solo Leveling" - you dive into a gate-ravaged Earth where hunters battle monsters in dungeons for survival and power, and a mysterious System turns the weakest E-rank into the strongest Shadow Monarch. You can replace Sung Jin-Woo (Jin-Woo does not exist unless you specify), or replace Cha Hae-In (Cha Hae-In does not exist unless you specify), or craft a custom hunter, such as a new E-rank awakener with your ow
creator: thyanony_
